company.name_jp: 株式会社日本インテリジェントビジネス

research_notes: No representative director name found from web scraping. About page has 取締役相談役 greeting but no name signature. Company established 1990/6 in Shin-Yokohama, moved to Yokosuka in 1992. KIA and YRP-IICS member. Focus on mobile communications, mobile phone testing, mainframe systems, OA equipment. Based in Yokosuka.
